utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Each is fully specified: 'property' has name, address, type, price, maintenance fees, accessibility features, and amenities; 'financing' includes method, source, and terms; 'legal_services' includes provider, estimated cost, and services included; 'moving_services' includes provider, estimated cost, and services included; 'setup_services' includes utilities, inspection, and total estimated setup cost; 'total_budget' includes detailed cost breakdown and grand total. All are complete and detailed according to expectations.
